apply.title: Apply for a Visa
apply.sub: Pick country → see checklist → OCR, in 3 steps
apply.scan_desc: Htex OCR auto-extracts key info from {name}:
apply.scan_hint: Demo data. To continue, upload the real document on the next step.
apply.no_materials: No materials found. Please contact support.

diagnose.title: Visa Diagnosis
diagnose.sub: 6 quick questions to predict your approval odds
diagnose.travel_history: International trips in the last 5 years
diagnose.travel_history_tip: Cross-border trips, including visa-free and visa-on-arrival; domestic travel not counted
diagnose.visa_history_tip: Counted by visa applications filed. Multiple applications to the same country stack; refusals are not counted.
diagnose.employment_tip: Part-time and contract workers count as employed; freelancers and self-employed should pick the next option; fresh grads, homemakers, or anyone between jobs pick 'Not currently working'
diagnose.subtitle: See your visa approval odds before you apply
diagnose.pick_materials: Pick the materials you already have
diagnose.no_local_materials: No local materials to diagnose yet. Upload and recognize them in the Material Wizard first.
diagnose.local_materials_hint: These materials are stored only in this browser — not on the server.
diagnose.passport_not_detected_detail: OCR couldn't find any passport features (header, MRZ code, etc.) in this image. The officer may ask you to re-upload or refuse the application.
diagnose.passport_not_detected_fix: Please upload a clear, complete passport bio page — not a household register, photo, or other document.
diagnose.passport_expiry_missing_detail: OCR could not read the expiry date. The officer may ask you to re-upload or refuse the application.
diagnose.passport_expiry_missing_fix: Please upload a clearer scan of the passport bio page, or fill in the expiry date manually.
diagnose.passport_expiry_short_title: Passport valid for less than {min_months} months
diagnose.passport_expiry_short_detail: Expires {expiry}, about {months_left} months left. Most countries require at least 6 months.
diagnose.passport_expiry_short_fix: Renew your passport before departure, otherwise the application will be refused.
diagnose.passport_no_suspicious_detail: Recognised passport number {passport_no} doesn't match the common format (1 letter + 7-8 digits).
diagnose.passport_no_suspicious_fix: Please confirm you uploaded the passport bio page (not the visa page or back cover).
diagnose.photo_bg_uncertain_detail: Most countries require a white background; some Southeast Asian countries accept blue.
diagnose.photo_bg_uncertain_fix: If applying to the US / UK / Japan / Korea, the background must be white.
diagnose.photo_bg_country_title: Please confirm the photo meets {country_name} requirements
diagnose.photo_bg_country_detail: {country_name} requires {spec}. The system can't tell the photo background color from the image — please verify the photo matches the spec before submitting.
diagnose.photo_bg_country_fix: Re-shoot a {spec} or visit a professional visa photo studio to get it right the first time.
diagnose.photo_bg_mismatch_detail: {country_name} requires {spec}. The filename suggests the uploaded photo's background color doesn't match the spec — this can lead to a direct refusal.
diagnose.photo_bg_mismatch_fix: Re-shoot a {spec} before uploading. Don't use phone selfies; visit a professional visa photo studio.
diagnose.ocr_failed_detail: OCR could not extract fields. Reviewing will take longer and the officer may ask you to re-upload.
diagnose.ocr_failed_fix: Please upload a clearer scan, or check whether the file is corrupted.
diagnose.travel_date_missing_detail: Without a travel date we can't check whether your passport is valid long enough.
diagnose.travel_date_missing_fix: Please enter the planned travel date in the form.
diagnose.purpose_missing_detail: Purpose affects the document checklist (business needs invitation letter, tourism needs itinerary).
diagnose.purpose_missing_fix: Please briefly indicate: tourism / business / family / study.
diagnose.bank_unparseable_title: Bank statement could not be parsed structurally
diagnose.bank_unparseable_detail: OCR detected content, but no structured transactions (transactions=0) could be extracted. The visa officer won't see specific income/spending — may be asked to resubmit.
diagnose.bank_unparseable_fix: Please upload a clear bank statement PDF/screenshot (last 3 months), or try another bank's electronic statement.
diagnose.bank_coverage_short_detail: Detected transactions span {months} months. Most embassies recommend 3-6 months of statements to assess financial stability.
diagnose.bank_coverage_short_fix: Please upload the last 3-6 months of statements (including this month), or combine multiple statements from different months.
diagnose.bank_income_low_detail: Detected average monthly income is around ¥{monthly_income}. The visa officer may ask for additional savings proof or sponsor letter.
diagnose.bank_income_low_fix: Also upload: savings certificate / property deed / sponsor income proof.
diagnose.bank_large_inflow_detail: Large inflows may make the visa officer suspect temporary deposits rather than stable income.
diagnose.bank_large_inflow_fix: If it's a gift or one-off amount, proactively explain the source at interview and provide proof.
diagnose.bank_income_gap_detail: Detected {gap_count} gap(s) in income; the longest is from {start_month} to {end_month} ({gap_months} months). The visa officer may ask for source of funds.
diagnose.bank_income_gap_fix: If job change/unemployment: provide resignation letter, new offer, sponsor letter. If study/leave: enrollment proof.
diagnose.bank_months_missing_title: Bank statement months not continuous, {n} month(s) missing
diagnose.bank_months_missing_detail: Missing months detected: {missing_months}. May be due to missed pages during PDF stitching, or the bank didn't issue a statement that month.
diagnose.bank_months_missing_fix: Please verify the original statement is complete, or upload a continuous 3-6 month statement.
diagnose.bank_sudden_inflow_title: {n} sudden deposit(s) detected (visa officer's red flag)
diagnose.bank_sudden_inflow_detail: E.g. ¥{top_amount} on {top_date} (severity: {top_severity}). The visa officer may suspect it's a last-minute balance buildup, not stable income.
diagnose.bank_sudden_inflow_fix: If it's real income (project settlement/tax refund), prepare a written explanation. Otherwise avoid large abnormal inflows in the 30 days before application.
diagnose.bank_balance_threshold_detail: Detected balance is around ¥{ending_balance_src}; {country} visa recommends balance ≥ ¥{ending_balance_dest} (cover {min_coverage_months} months, daily ≥ ¥{daily_min_dest}).
diagnose.bank_balance_threshold_fix: Recommend supplementing: savings certificate / sponsor letter / statement with higher balance.
diagnose.bank_balance_coverage_title: Balance insufficient to cover trip budget
diagnose.bank_balance_coverage_detail: Detected balance is around ¥{ending_balance}; estimated budget for {stay_days}-day trip is around ¥{budget_total} (flights + hotel + meals + misc). Balance < budget may raise payment ability concerns.
diagnose.bank_balance_coverage_fix: Recommend supplementing savings certificate / asset proof (property/car/investments), or shortening trip / lowering hotel standards.
diagnose.reason_passport_6m: A passport valid for at least 6 months is required
diagnose.reason_financial_bank: Recent bank statements / proof of assets recommended
diagnose.reason_photo_basic: A visa photo meeting specifications is required
diagnose.reason_us_passport: Passport valid for at least 6 months required
diagnose.reason_id_photo: Red or white background 2-inch photo required

documents.page_subtitle: Documents stay on this device only. Scan or pick files for instant recognition — originals are never stored on our servers.

documents.empty_d: Use either button above to start. We recommend uploading your passport bio page first.

transfer.h5_unknown_error: Connection failed — please refresh and try again
transfer.h5_foot: Your phone and your computer share this session only. Data is encrypted end-to-end and never sent to third parties.
transfer.h5_too_big: File too big — please compress to under 10MB

passport.expiry_min_6m: Passport expires in less than 6 months — most countries will refuse. Please renew.
passport.expiry_min_3m: Passport expires in less than 3 months — some airlines will deny boarding. Consider renewing.
passport.no_format: Passport number format is invalid. PRC passports must be 1 letter + 8 digits.
passport.dob_past: Date of birth cannot be in the future.
passport.age_min_16: Applicant must be at least 16 years old. Otherwise a guardian must apply on their behalf.
passport.name_length: Surname / given name must be 1–64 characters.

image.blur: Image is too blurry. Retake with good lighting.
image.resolution: Resolution too low. Minimum 800×600 pixels required.
image.size: File too large. Single file must be ≤ 10MB. Compress and re-upload.
image.format: Unsupported format. Only JPEG / PNG / WebP / PDF allowed.

travel.date_range: Travel date must be within the next 12 months and not in the past.
travel.stay_max: Stay exceeds 90 days — you may need a long-stay visa instead.

student.enrollment_age: Enrollment letter is older than 90 days. Please request a fresh one.

photo.face: No clear face detected. Please upload a front-facing, uncovered photo.
photo.bg: Photo background must be pure white. Current background is not compliant.

ocr.confidence: OCR confidence is low. Please upload a clearer original.

pass.ok: Field passed all checks. No action needed.

ratelimit.err_interval_range: Account interval must be between {min} and {max} minutes

orders.submit_success: Order created! Redirecting to order detail…
orders.err_dob_future: Date of birth cannot be in the future
orders.err_passport_format: Passport number format invalid (PRC: 1 letter + 8 digits)
orders.err_passport_expiry: Passport must be valid for at least 6 months
orders.err_stay_days: Stay must be between 1 and 90 days
orders.err_emergency_phone: Please enter a valid mobile number
orders.sub_tabs_missing_tooltip: This section has {n} required field(s) not yet filled
orders.one_click_import_hint: Name & passport will be prefilled; complete the rest of the form.
orders.err_form_incomplete: Please fill in all required fields
orders.section_uk_extras_desc: Matches GOV.UK online form fields. Funds and employment help with document checklist.
orders.section_declarations_desc: Health, character and immigration declarations must be answered truthfully on the official site. Htex only records your acknowledgment here.
orders.field_au_visa_refused: Ever had a visa refused or cancelled?
orders.field_declarations_ack: I understand I must answer declarations truthfully on the official site
orders.section_personal1_desc: Corresponds to the DS-160 Personal Information 1 page.
orders.section_address: Address and Phone — Where you live now
orders.section_companions: Travel Companions — Anyone traveling with you?
orders.section_previous_us_desc: Answer truthfully. Further explanation goes in Security & Background.
orders.section_us_contact_desc: Person, hotel, or company in the U.S. you know (or hotel if none).
orders.section_family_desc: If you don't know a field, leave it blank and tick "Does Not Apply".
orders.section_security_desc: The 5 categories below (health / criminal / immigration / public benefits / misc.) must be answered personally by the applicant on ceac.state.gov. Htex only records acknowledgment.
orders.placeholder_native_name: e.g. 张三 / Nguyễn Văn A
orders.hint_native_name: Use your native script if different from passport; tick "Does Not Apply" otherwise
orders.field_has_other_nationality: Do you hold any other nationality?
orders.hint_national_id: Leave blank if you don't have one
orders.hint_us_ssn: Leave blank if you don't have one
orders.hint_us_tax_id: Leave blank if you don't have one
orders.hint_passport_book_number: Most passports don't have this → tick "Does Not Apply"
orders.field_has_companions: Are there other persons traveling with you?
orders.field_previous_has_visited: Have you ever been in the U.S.?
orders.field_previous_last_visit_stay_days: Length of Stay on Last Visit (days)
orders.field_previous_has_visa: Have you ever been issued a U.S. Visa?
orders.hint_visa_number: 8-digit red number, bottom-right of old visa
orders.field_previous_has_refused: Have you ever been refused a U.S. Visa or refused admission?
orders.field_father_in_us: Is your father in the U.S.?
orders.field_mother_in_us: Is your mother in the U.S.?
orders.field_has_us_relatives: Do you have any immediate relatives (other than spouse) in the U.S.?
orders.hint_optional_dna: Not sure? Tick the Does Not Apply checkbox below
orders.hint_occupation: e.g. Student / Teacher / Engineer / Doctor / Unemployed
orders.field_has_education: Have you attended any educational institutions at secondary level or above?
orders.field_security_acknowledged: I have read and understood the 5 Security & Background question categories
orders.hint_security: Part 1 Health / Part 2 Criminal / Part 3 Immigration / Part 4 Public Benefits / Part 5 Misc. — see official DS-160 source. Applicant must answer personally on ceac.state.gov.
orders.hint_us_address: Hotel name + street address (corresponds to U.S. Stay Address on DS-160)
orders.dna_hint: Tick to mark this field as not applicable
orders.security_part1_intro: These questions cover disease, medical history, and addiction. Answer truthfully — a past diagnosis does not equal a denial.
orders.security_part1_q1: Have you ever had a communicable disease (e.g. TB, syphilis, gonorrhea, leprosy)?
orders.security_part1_q2: Do you have a physical or mental disorder that would impair your ability to work or study in the U.S.?
orders.security_part1_q3: Have you ever abused or been addicted to drugs or alcohol?
orders.security_part1_q4: Have you ever been refused entry to or deported from any country?
orders.security_part1_explain: If you answered Yes to any of the above, please briefly explain:
orders.security_part2_intro: These questions cover criminal, terrorist, espionage history. Any record must be disclosed.
orders.security_part2_q1: Have you ever been arrested or convicted of any crime (even if charges were dropped)?
orders.security_part2_q2: Have you ever violated any law related to controlled substances (drugs)?
orders.security_part2_q3: Have you ever engaged in, or intended to engage in, terrorist, espionage, or sabotage activity?
orders.security_part2_q4: Have you ever participated in genocide, torture, political/religious oppression, or group violence?
orders.security_part2_q5: Have you ever deceived or concealed facts to evade legal liability?
orders.security_part2_explain: If you answered Yes to any of the above, please briefly explain:
orders.security_part3_intro: These questions cover visa/immigration violations. Past refusals must be disclosed.
orders.security_part3_q1: Have you ever sought permanent residence or immigration status in the U.S. through fraud or misrepresentation?
orders.security_part3_q2: Have you ever engaged in fraud, forgery, or bribery to obtain a U.S. visa?
orders.security_part3_q3: Have you ever made willful misrepresentations during U.S. immigration/labor/customs/agricultural inspections?
orders.security_part3_q4: Have you ever worked in the U.S. without authorization?
orders.security_part3_q5: Have you ever overstayed a nonimmigrant visa by more than 180 days in the U.S.?
orders.security_part3_q6: Have you ever been deported, removed, or issued a removal order from the U.S.?
orders.security_part3_explain: If you answered Yes to any of the above, please briefly explain:
orders.security_part4_intro: These questions cover U.S. public benefit dependency.
orders.security_part4_q1: Have you ever sought U.S. public assistance because of inability to pay medical costs?
orders.security_part4_q2: Have you ever received U.S. federal, state, or local welfare/relief due to poverty?
orders.security_part4_q3: Have you been disqualified from U.S. public benefits within the last 5 years for violating the rules?
orders.security_part4_explain: If you answered Yes to any of the above, please briefly explain:
orders.security_part5_intro: These questions cover other compliance matters.
orders.security_part5_q1: Have you ever engaged in any form of human smuggling or trafficking while in the U.S.?
orders.security_part5_q2: Have you ever willfully failed to report taxable income or concealed assets?
orders.security_part5_q3: Have you ever provided false information in child custody / adoption proceedings?
orders.security_part5_q4: Have you ever violated any voting/election rules while in the U.S.?
orders.security_part5_explain: If you answered Yes to any of the above, please briefly explain:
orders.work_employer_full: Full employer address — street / city / state / postal / country
orders.ocr_tip_passport: Upload a passport photo and the system will auto-recognize the fields above

pricing.title: Pay only when approved
pricing.sub: Transparent pricing — service fee refunded if your visa is denied.
pricing.refund_consulate_note: Collected by the consulate, independent of the outcome
pricing.total_note: Total = consulate fee + service fee. The service fee is refundable on denial; the consulate fee follows the consulate policy.
pricing.service_refund_desc: If your application is denied, the $19.9 service fee is returned to your original payment within 3–5 business days.
pricing.consulate_no_refund_desc: Consulate fees are collected and processed by the consulate under their own rules and are not affected by the visa decision.
pricing.note_1: Refund: submit denial proof on the order page. Reviewed within 1 business day.
pricing.note_3: Contact: scan the QR code on the order page, or call 400-000-0000 ext. 1.

privacy_consent.title: Sensitive data consent
privacy_consent.body: You are about to upload documents containing personal sensitive data. By continuing, you consent to collection, storage, and use for visa application services per our Privacy Policy.

agreement.__legal_review_pending__: GDPR / UU PDP / Nghị định 13–aligned product draft — legal counsel sign-off required before public launch. See docs/LEGAL_REVIEW_NOTES.md
agreement.page_subtitle: Please read the following terms carefully
agreement.beta_disclaimer: Note: This is a self-service compliance draft aligned with GDPR Chapter V (transfers) and Article 8 (minors). Production data residency will be disclosed before launch. Formal legal review is required before public release.
agreement.terms_section_1_body: Htex is a visa application assistance platform offering checklists, OCR, AI pre-validation, form filling, and order tracking. We do not issue visas; embassies and consulates make final decisions. Automated embassy submission (RPA) and refusal insurance are not currently available.
agreement.terms_section_2_body: Users must ensure all submitted identity, passport, and travel information is true, accurate, and complete. Any consequences from false information (refusal, fines, legal action) are the user's responsibility.
agreement.terms_section_3_body: A platform service fee (~$99/order, as shown at checkout) applies separately from consulate fees (usually non-refundable). If the Platform fails to deliver the contracted service, the platform fee is refunded. User-caused refusals are handled per checkout terms (insurance terms do not apply while insurance is disabled).
agreement.terms_section_4_body: The Platform protects user privacy. See the Privacy Policy for details.
agreement.terms_section_5_body: We do not guarantee embassy outcomes. For outages caused by networks, third parties, or force majeure, we will try to restore service but liability is limited to the platform fee paid for the affected order.
agreement.terms_section_6_body: You must be at least 16 years old to register and use the Platform (aligned with the GDPR Article 8 default age of consent for information society services). Users under 16 may not self-register. Submitting visa materials for a minor requires a parent or legal guardian (or their explicit authorisation), who remains responsible for accuracy. Where Indonesian or Vietnamese law imposes a higher age or parental-consent rule, that local rule prevails.
agreement.privacy_section_1_body: We may collect: account info (email, username), applicant identity (name, passport number, birth date, nationality), travel info, uploaded documents (passport, photo, bank statements), order and payment records, and device/log data for security. Passport and similar identity documents are sensitive data and are processed only with your explicit consent.
agreement.privacy_section_2_title: 2. How we use it & legal bases
agreement.privacy_section_2_body: Your data is used to generate checklists and forms, run OCR/AI checks, process orders, provide support, handle payments, and meet legal/security requirements. Legal bases include: performance of our contract with you; your explicit consent (e.g. sensitive document upload); and legitimate interests (security auditing, balanced against your rights). We do not sell your personal information.
agreement.privacy_section_3_body: Data is transmitted over HTTPS/TLS 1.2+. Production data residency will be disclosed in this policy before public launch; until then data may reside on development/test infrastructure. When personal data is transferred across borders (including from Indonesia/Vietnam to another country), we apply GDPR Chapter V–style safeguards: (1) Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) or an equivalent Data Processing Agreement with recipients; (2) data minimisation and purpose limitation; (3) security assessments, registration, or filings required by local law (including Indonesia UU PDP transfer mechanisms and Vietnam Nghị định 13 requirements where applicable). When you submit a visa application, identity and travel data may be provided to destination-country authorities as required by the embassy/consulate. You may object to or withdraw consent for non-mandatory transfers via privacy@htex.app (without affecting transfers already made to perform the contract).
agreement.privacy_section_4_body: We may use Stripe (payments), Google (optional sign-in), and OCR/AI providers (document recognition, itinerary) as processors or independent controllers. They process data only as needed to provide their service, under their privacy policies and our data-processing terms. Explicit consent is obtained again before sharing sensitive documents with a third party beyond what is needed to deliver the ordered service.
agreement.privacy_section_5_body: You can view/correct applicant info, change email, or request account deletion (permanent after a 72-hour grace period) in Profile. You also have rights of access, rectification, erasure, restriction, objection, withdrawal of consent, and — where applicable — data portability (GDPR Arts. 12–22; equivalent rights under UU PDP and Nghị định 13 apply as required). Email privacy@htex.app; we aim to respond within 15 business days unless local law sets a different deadline.
agreement.privacy_section_6_body: The Platform is not offered directly to users under 16 (GDPR Art. 8 default; Member States may lower to no less than 13 — we apply 16 uniformly). Users under 16 must not self-register. Visa filings for minors must be made by a parent/legal guardian on their own account with confirmed authority. Where UU PDP (Indonesia) or Nghị định 13 (Vietnam) require guardian consent for children's data, those rules apply. Contact us immediately to delete any data collected from under-age users by mistake.
agreement.privacy_section_7_body: For privacy questions, data-subject requests, or security reports, email {email}. We will respond within a reasonable time. Before public launch we will publish a privacy contact (and local representative details if required).

rpa.foot_note: Submission is handled automatically by the RPA bot — typically takes 2-5 minutes. You'll receive an email/SMS notification once submitted.

wizard.title: Material Collection
wizard.local_storage_hint: Originals are processed on this device only. Recognition results are saved in your browser (7-day TTL) and are not archived on the server.
wizard.subtitle: Submit each category in order — pass validation to move to the next step
wizard.warn_blurry: Image looks blurry — retake for a clearer copy
wizard.warn_incomplete: Document edges may be cropped — retake so all 4 corners are visible
wizard.finish_text: All materials collected ({n} files). Next, fill out the application form — recognized passport and itinerary info will be auto-filled.
wizard.item_passport_hint: Passport bio page (photo, name, number, expiry)
wizard.item_photo_hint: White-background 2-inch photo, taken within the last 6 months
wizard.item_household_hint: Household register front page + your own page
wizard.item_bank_hint: Bank statement from the last 6 months, balance ≥ {cur}{amount}
wizard.item_employment_hint: Must include: company name, job title, start date, company stamp and contact info; sole proprietors/legal reps may submit a business license copy
wizard.item_insurance_hint: Should cover the entire trip, coverage ≥ {cur}{amount} recommended; upload later if not purchased yet
wizard.err_expiry_short: Passport valid for less than {months} months (about {remain} left) — please replace it and re-upload
wizard.err_expiry_missing: Could not read the expiry date from the passport — please re-upload a clearer bio page
wizard.issue_travel_dates_detail: Please fill in departure and return dates
wizard.issue_depart_past_title: Departure date cannot be before today
wizard.issue_return_before_depart_title: Return date must be after the departure date
wizard.issue_attractions_missing_detail: Add at least 1 stop/attraction to generate the itinerary
wizard.travel_recommend_label: Reference flights (click to select, or enter manually)
wizard.travel_hotel_name_ph: Enter the name of your booked hotel
wizard.travel_attractions_hint: Add stops/attractions in visiting order — used to auto-generate the itinerary
wizard.diag_expiry_missing_detail: OCR could not read the passport's expiry date — the visa officer may ask for a resubmission or reject the application outright.
wizard.diag_expiry_short_title: Passport valid for less than {minMonths} months
wizard.diag_expiry_short_detail: Expires {expiry}, about {monthsLeft} months left; most countries require ≥{minMonths} months.
wizard.diag_no_suspicious_detail: The recognized passport number "{passportNo}" doesn't match the common format (1 letter + 7-8 digits).
wizard.diag_bg_uncertain_title: Please confirm the photo background color
wizard.diag_bg_uncertain_detail: Most countries require a white-background photo; some Southeast Asian countries accept blue.
wizard.diag_ocr_failed_detail: OCR could not extract fields — this may slow down officer review or get the document sent back for re-upload.
wizard.issue_city_missing_detail: Please fill in a city for every day of the trip
wizard.itinerary_incomplete_error: Itinerary incomplete — every day needs a city and accommodation
wizard.travel_day_attraction_ph: e.g. Louvre, Eiffel Tower (leave blank for AI to fill)
wizard.ocr_complete_remaining: Please complete the remaining required fields
wizard.travel_days_hint: Fill in the city, transport, and hotel for each day; leave the itinerary/attraction blank to let AI fill it in
wizard.travel_return_openjaw_hint: Defaults to destination -> origin, but you can change it (e.g. returning from a different city)
wizard.err_not_passport_detected: Could not recognize passport information in this image — please make sure you're uploading a clear, complete passport bio page (not a household register, photo, or other document)
wizard.diag_not_detected_detail: OCR could not find any passport features (header, MRZ, etc.) in this image — the visa officer may ask for a resubmission or reject the application outright.
wizard.err_material_deleted: This material was removed on the server. Please re-upload.
wizard.toast_stale_materials: {n} of your materials were removed on the server. Please re-upload before submitting.
wizard.err_next_blocked: This category is incomplete. Please fill required fields before continuing.

bank_review.title: Bank Statement Insights
bank_review.footer_note: These are non-blocking hints — they won't stop your application, but addressing them before submission reduces the chance of being asked for additional materials or refused.
bank_review.suggestion_parse_fail: OCR couldn't read a valid statement (only {got} lines found). Please rescan or upload a clearer PDF, making sure all four corners are visible.
bank_review.suggestion_coverage_short: We recommend at least {min} months of statements; only {got} months were detected. Consider combining statements from multiple accounts (e.g. salary + savings) to extend coverage.
bank_review.suggestion_balance_low: Your current balance ({actual_fmt} {currency}) is below the typical {destination} visa threshold ({expected_fmt} {currency}). Top up before submission, or attach a deposit certificate.
bank_review.suggestion_income_gap: We noticed no income from {start} to {end} ({months} months in a row). The visa officer may ask for an explanation — prepare a written statement (e.g. self-employment, family support, project income).
bank_review.suggestion_large_txns: Detected {in_count} large inbound and {out_count} large outbound transactions. The visa officer may ask about the source/destination — keep payslips, bonus letters, or gift letters ready.
bank_review.suggestion_income_low: Average monthly income is {actual_fmt}, which is on the low side. Supplement with other proof of funds (deposit, property, tax records, stock account).
bank_review.suggestion_generic: Please prepare supplementary materials based on the above.
bank_review.detail_BANK_PARSE_FAIL: OCR could not extract a valid bank statement from this image (likely a poor scan or a wrong document).
bank_review.detail_BANK_COVERAGE_SHORT: We detected {got} months of transactions; embassies typically want at least 6 months.
bank_review.detail_BANK_INCOME_GAP: Between {start} and {end}, {months} consecutive months had no inbound income.
bank_review.detail_BANK_LARGE_TXNS: Detected {in_count} large inbound and {out_count} large outbound transactions (each above the local threshold).
bank_review.detail_BANK_INCOME_LOW: Average monthly inbound over the last few months: {actual_fmt}.
